title: polianthes oliveriana
intro: Polianthes oliveriana, commonly known as the "Tuberose" or "Rajanigandha", is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asphodelaceae family. Its fragrant, white, waxy flowers are highly valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Polianthes oliveriana are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
